MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $100/MO. BEGINNING ON FEB. 1, 2005 & THE IST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UDALTSOVA, TATYANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUCHI, EDMUNDO ANTHONY $4,025.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,057.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

IN FULL. MOTION CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
